# JRC Detailing

> Premium mobile car detailing in Victoria Point, Redlands and Brisbane South, Queensland, Australia. Ceramic coating, paint correction, interior detailing. 7+ years experience. Trusted by BMW, Mercedes and major dealerships.

## Business Details

- Owner: Jesse Curtain
- Location: Victoria Point, QLD, Australia (mobile service, no fixed shopfront)
- Phone: 0481 998 874
- Email: jesse@jrcdetailing.com.au
- Website: https://jrcdetailing.com.au
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jrc.detailing_/
- Google Business: https://g.page/r/CZuK3_XFd-o_EAI
- Operating Hours: 7 days, 7:00 AM to 6:00 PM, by appointment

## Services and Pricing

- Mini Detail: $99. Quick refresh including wash, vacuum, windows, wheel dress.
- Interior Detail: $189. Deep clean with shampoo, steam cleaning, deodoriser.
- Full Cut and Polish: $320. 3-stage machine polish, clay bar, sealant wax.
- Full Detail: $370. Complete inside and out package. Most popular.
- Prestige Detail: $550. Ultimate bumper-to-bumper transformation with 2-stage polish, engine bay, headlight restoration.
- Ceramic Coating: Custom quote. Professional-grade Gyeon and CarPro coating systems over fully corrected paint.

## Add-on Services

- Headlight Restoration: $50
- Dog Hair Removal: $40
- Hydrophobic Glass Coating: $100
- Carpet and Leather Protection: $120

## Service Areas

Victoria Point, Cleveland, Capalaba, Redland Bay, Thornlands, Wellington Point, Ormiston, Alexandra Hills, Birkdale, Sheldon, Mount Cotton, Wynnum, Manly, Chandler, Springwood, Rochedale, Logan, Brisbane CBD, Brisbane South.

## Products Used

AutoSmart, Bowden's Own, Gyeon, CarPro. Professional-grade products only.

## Customer Reviews

- Rating: 5.0 stars from 47 Google reviews
- Google Reviews: https://g.page/r/CZuK3_XFd-o_EAI/review
- Customers consistently rate paint correction and ceramic coating results as exceptional

## Dealership Experience

Trusted by BMW, Mercedes, Mazda, Ford, Hyundai, Nissan, and Geely dealerships.
